name: P-3 eval-history records a regression delta against the prior version when one exists per the architecture
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents prompts/eval-history/test-agent && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && printf '%s' '{"eval_pass_rate":0.5}' > prompts/eval-history/test-agent/0.9.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 2>/dev/null && grep -qE 'regression|delta|prior' prompts/eval-history/test-agent/1.0.0.json && echo delta 1>&2
